description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build Release that triggers on release creation. Run a matrix job across ubuntu-latest, macos-12, and windows-latest, setting up Python 3.x and checking out code with submodules. Install ninja build tool on each OS, then use CMake to configure and build the project. Strip binaries on non-Windows platforms, and create a tarball and SHA256 sum of the release. Upload these assets to the release using the upload-release-action.
